rationale: C20 next_cycle_plan: bug hunt C20 + HubAntre visual refresh. Bug hunt verified journey_map_display.gd and end_run_screen.gd — 0 bugs. All 3 flagged issues were false positives (queue_redraw intentional for pulse, typed Dictionary return always valid, non-Array fallback correct). Feature: added faction reputation mini-bars and Ogham equipment display to HubAntre with full CRT aesthetic. Faction bars show 5 factions with DRU/ANC/KOR/NIA/ANK abbreviations, colored fill (phosphor_dim < 50, amber >= 50, amber_bright >= 80), threshold markers at 50 and 80 positions, live-updating via store.reputation_changed signal. Ogham display shows unicode glyphs of owned runes with bracketed equipped ones. Both panels use terminal font, bg_deep background, sharp CRT corners.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C21 (verify HubAntre faction_bars Dictionary retrieval handles empty/null store state, Ogham unicode rendering with VT323 font). Then feature: biome maturity indicators on BiomeRadial — show run count per biome, maturity score calculation from MerlinConstants.MATURITY_WEIGHTS, color-coded ring segments. This completes the HubAntre visual refresh trilogy (factions ✓, oghams ✓, biomes next).
